# terrible_community_general_wakeonlan (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this data source against
- `mac` (String) MAC address to send Wake-on-LAN broadcast packet for.

### Optional

- `broadcast` (String) Network broadcast address to use for broadcasting magic Wake-on-LAN packet.
- `port` (Number) UDP port to use for magic Wake-on-LAN packet.
